predicates.name: is_foreigner
predicates.description: The person cannot prove Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is not an EU citizen and not a person covered by EU free movement law.

predicates.name: in_illegal_residence
predicates.description: The person is present on the territory without meeting or no longer meeting the conditions for access or residence.

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

predicates.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

predicates.name: subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure to determine or transfer to the responsible member state for processing an international protection request.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination has been performed for the person.

predicates.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
predicates.description: The person did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay, or did not submit an international protection request within the legally prescribed period.

predicates.name: used_false_information_or_documents
predicates.description: The person used false or misleading information, false or forged documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or pushback.

predicates.name: failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for enforcement or supervision of regulations on access, residence, establishment, and removal of foreigners.

predicates.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_measure
predicates.description: The person has declared or demonstrated unwillingness to comply with a transfer, pushback, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure, or has already failed to comply with such a measure.

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom
predicates.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom that has not been lifted or suspended.

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_other_member_state
predicates.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in another member state that has not been lifted or suspended.

predicates.name: filed_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision
predicates.description: The person filed a new residence application or new international protection request immediately after being subject to a refusal of entry or residence, a decision ending their stay, or a pushback or removal measure.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
predicates.description: When questioned on this point, the person concealed that they had previously given fingerprints in another state bound by EU regulations on determining the responsible state for processing an international protection request.

predicates.name: multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
predicates.description: The person has submitted multiple international protection requests and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or in one or more other member states that resulted in a negative decision or did not lead to the issuance of a residence permit.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_request_in_other_state
predicates.description: When questioned on this point, the person concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection request in another state bound by EU regulations on determining the responsible state.

predicates.name: came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_application
predicates.description: The person declared or their file shows that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection request or residence application.

predicates.name: fined_for_manifestly_unfounded_appeal
predicates.description: The person is subject to a fine because they filed a manifestly unlawful appeal with the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: holds_valid_travel_or_identity_document
predicates.description: The person holds a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognised_as_national_by_country_of_origin
predicates.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which declared willingness to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: nationality_eligible_for_ministerial_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The person falls under a nationality category for which the minister can issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one of the objective criteria listed in paragraph 2 is met for the person.

predicates.name: is_identified_foreigner
predicates.description: The person qualifies as an identified foreigner: holds a valid travel document, passport, or identity document; or is recognised as a national by their country's authority willing to issue a laissez-passer; or falls under a nationality category for which the minister can issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: There is a risk of absconding for the person as defined in paragraph 1(11): there are reasons to believe the person will abscond, established after individual examination on the basis of one or more objective criteria.
